title: MCQ Question Record
description: Schema for one multiple-choice question record in src/lib/data/questions.json or imported question sets.

id.description: Stable unique identifier. Prefer a namespaced string for production imports; existing numeric seed IDs are supported for compatibility.

question.description: Question prompt shown to the learner.

options.description: Exactly four answer choices displayed as A/B/C/D in array order.

correct.description: Zero-based index into options. 0 = A, 1 = B, 2 = C, 3 = D.

tags.description: One or more canonical topic labels/IDs from taxonomy.js, or legacy aliases explicitly mapped there.

examples.question: Which HTTP status code indicates a successful GET request?
examples.explanation: HTTP 200 OK means the request succeeded and the response contains the requested data.
